hooks.command: echo '=== git worktrees ==='; git worktree list; echo; echo '=== current branch ==='; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; echo; if [ "$(git worktree list | wc -l)" -gt 1 ]; then echo 'NOTE: multiple worktrees exist — if another Claude session is active in this repo, call EnterWorktree before editing to avoid cross-session conflicts.'; fi
